full_description: TaskMaster is a task management app designed to help users prioritize and organize their tasks, from work projects to personal to-do lists. It includes a calendar view to visualize upcoming deadlines and reminders to ensure you never miss a task. With TaskMaster, you can create and manage your tasks, set deadlines, and track progress. The app is intuitive and easy to use, allowing you to focus on what's important. Key features include: task prioritization, calendar view, reminders, and progress tracking. Download TaskMaster today and start managing your tasks like a pro!
